message:
test(engine): update integration test assertions for expanded module implementations

Adjust integration tests to match the new full implementations of core
engine modules. These changes fix assertion expectations, update mock
configurations, and align test harnesses with the expanded API surfaces
introduced in the source module expansion.

Modified tests:
- activation_lifecycle: updated lifecycle state transition assertions
- activation_lifecycle_integration: adjusted integration flow expectations
- adversarial_campaign_integration: minor assertion fix
- benchmark_e2e_integration: updated benchmark expectations
- cancellation_lifecycle_integration: adjusted cancellation flow
- constrained_ambient_benchmark_lane_integration: updated lane config
- demotion_rollback_integration: minor assertion alignment
- extension_lifecycle_manager_integration: updated lifecycle config
- feature_parity_tracker_integration: expanded parity check assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
